title: Persistent Volumes — Volume populators and data sources
text:
Volume cloning
and
snapshot restore
pre-populate
a new volume from a built-in
data source
.
Volume populators
extend this mechanism so that
a PersistentVolumeClaim can be pre-populated from other kinds of source (a custom resource),
referenced through its
dataSourceRef
field:
apiVersion
:
v1
kind
:
PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata
:
name
:
populated-pvc
spec
:
dataSourceRef
:
name
:
example-name
kind
:
ExampleDataSource
apiGroup
:
example.storage.k8s.io
accessModes
:
-
ReadWriteOnce
resources
:
requests
:
storage
:
10Gi
For details, including cross-namespace data sources, see
Volume Populators and Data Sources
.
